untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'central bank or institutional intervention' which is not measurable from standard OHLCV technical indicators. Central bank activity, coordinated purchases/sales, and official sector transactions are not available in the allowed indicator set. The core logic—reducing positions when intervention opposes trend direction—cannot be operationalized without external data feeds or news/macro event inputs.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using ADX (trend confirmation) and volume (as weak proxy for institutional activity), but this does not capture the actual intervention detection mechanism specified in the signal. The 15+ bar trend requirement is approximated by ADX > 25. The 2 ATR exit reversal is directly translatable. Manual discretionary overlay required to identify actual central bank/institutional opposition.
